heading: Registration—persons paying a special tax
label: 7011 Registration—persons paying a special tax
notes: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 94–455
amendments: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 94–455

children.heading: Requirement
children.label: a Requirement
children.text: Every person engaged in any trade or business on which a special tax is imposed by law shall register with the Secretary his name or style, place of residence, trade or business, and the place where such trade or business is to be carried on. In case of a firm or company, the names of the several persons constituting the same, and the places of residence, shall be so registered.

children.heading: Registration in case of death or change of location
children.label: b Registration in case of death or change of location
children.text: Any person exempted under the provisions of section 4905 from the payment of a special tax, shall register with the Secretary in accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary.
